title: oreogrammitis jeraiensis
intro: Oreogrammitis jeraiensis is a species of fern within the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the Jerai fern. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis jeraiensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties.
